---
description: Rename your active or updating subscriptions.
---

# Rename subscription

You can rename your subscription so you can find it easily in your list of subscriptions.&#x20;

A subscription can be renamed using the Rename option on the subscription details page. Only active and updating subscriptions can be renamed.

{% hint style="info" %}
Changing the subscription name only affects its display in the Marketplace. The updated subscription name is not reflected in the vendor systems.
{% endhint %}

### Rename a subscription

To rename a subscription:

1. Go to **Marketplace** > **Subscriptions**.
2. Select the subscription to rename.
3. On the subscription details page, select the dropdown arrow <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" data-size="line">, then choose **Rename**.

<div data-with-frame="true"><figure><img src="../../../.gitbook/assets/Rename1 (1).png" alt=""><figcaption><p>Select <strong>Rename</strong> to edit the the subscription name.</p></figcaption></figure></div>

4. In the **Rename** dialog, enter the new name, then select **Save**. The subscription is renamed.
